data.name: Penicl Pushers: Sexy office
data.detailed_description:
🔥❤️ ADD OUR NEW GAMES TO WISHLIST ❤️🔥


關於此遊戲

Welcome to Penicl Pushers Inc.!👔✏️

Every day here means endless reports, memos, forms, and tight deadlines.
What does the company actually do? Nobody knows.
Why are all these documents needed? Even the CEO probably can’t answer.
But one thing is clear — they’re the best at what they do. And you? You’re the newest cog in this mad machine.

From day one, you’re greeted by your strict, charismatic, and slightly… wild boss — a mysterious shapeshifter ruling the office with an iron fist (and claws).

And she’s not the only one: around you is a whole zoo of stunning office beauties:

👠A clumsy but incredibly hot coworker who spills coffee daily — and has a chest straight out of an anime;
👠A cold gyaru with icy eyes and a burning interest in newcomers;
👠A tomboy with a wrench in her pocket and freedom in her step;
👠Plus a dozen more women, each with her own goals, desires… and plans for you.

They constantly need help — sign a form, find a folder, check some documents…
But somehow, it always ends up behind closed doors.
And honestly? You’re not complaining. Just don’t forget to finish your weekly report.

Game Features:

📌Merge2 puzzles
📌A hot office story
📌Fully voiced and animated sex scenes
📌Dual character styles — choose between human and furry versions of the heroines
📌Relationship system
📌Plenty of women to suit every taste

At Penicl Pushers, career growth is fast — especially if you know how to use your hands! (And not just for paperwork ;) )

data.short_description: Solve Merge2 puzzles by combining documents and seducing your coworkers. At Penicl Pushers, office routine is the least of your worries — a strict boss-shapeshifter, a gyaru, a tomboy, and other hot girls are waiting for you.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 顯示卡: 512MB+
